inputs.label: Akışkan Yoğunluğu
inputs.businessContext: Akışkanın yoğunluğu (kg/m³). Su için 1000, hava için yaklaşık 1.225.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fluid density (kg/m³). For water 1000, for air approximately 1.225.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Akışkanın yoğunluğu (kg/m³). Su için 1000, hava için yaklaşık 1.225.
businessContext_i18n.de: Dichte des Fluids (kg/m³). Für Wasser 1000, für Luft ca. 1,225.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Densité du fluide (kg/m³). Pour l'eau 1000, pour l'air environ 1,225.
businessContext_i18n.es: Densidad del fluido (kg/m³). Para agua 1000, para aire aprox. 1.225.

businessContext_i18n.en: Acceleration due to gravity (m/s²). Average ~9.81 on Earth's surface.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erdbeschleunigung (m/s²). Auf der Erdoberfläche im Durchschnitt ~9,81.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Accélération gravitationnelle (m/s²). À la surface de la Terre, moyenne ~9,81.
businessContext_i18n.es: Aceleración gravitacional (m/s²). En la superficie terrestre promedio ~9.81.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تسارع الجاذبية (م/ث²). على سطح الأرض متوسط ~9.81.

businessContext_i18n.en: Height or depth of liquid column (m).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur ou profondeur de la colonne de liquide (m).
businessContext_i18n.es: Altura de la columna de fluido o profundidad (m).

inputs.label: Atmosfer Basıncı
inputs.businessContext: Yüzeydeki atmosfer basıncı (Pa). Deniz seviyesinde standart 101325.

businessContext_i18n.en: Atmospheric pressure at surface (Pa). Standard at sea level is 101325.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yüzeydeki atmosfer basıncı (Pa). Deniz seviyesinde standart 101325.
businessContext_i18n.de: Atmosphärendruck an der Oberfläche (Pa). Auf Meereshöhe Standard 101325.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pression atmosphérique à la surface (Pa). Au niveau de la mer, standard 101325.
businessContext_i18n.es: Presión atmosférica en la superficie (Pa). A nivel del mar estándar 101325.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الضغط الجوي على السطح (باسكال). عند مستوى سطح البحر المعياري 101325.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
